rationale: Added finally block and explicitly raised CancelledError to prevent skewing metrics.
Implemented json.loads parser instead of volatile string matching for stream sequences.
Changed empty timeout except clauses to directly fail the pytest routine.
Consolidated fix into the previous timeout failure implementation.
Corrected markdown syntax on tasks list.
Refactored tags to use constant 'stream': 'livelogs' instead of high cardinality IDs.
Duplicate of the unused import reports.
Duplicate of timeout unreliability. Addressed via pytest.fail implementation.
Bound file level integration and asyncio pytestmark labels.
